item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses opening another door-access handling channel, names the repeated pattern across dorm repairs, classroom equipment, venue conflicts, and access requests, explains why N+1 routing worsens ownership/intake fragmentation, and moves upstream to consolidate routing rules and responsibility. It does not provide the requested new channel, queue, entry point, or implementation steps."}
